channel.title: Finance on CJ's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Finance on CJ's Blog

item.title: Referral Links
item.description:
If you’d like to support me in an indirect way, you can use the following referral links:

Capital One Venture X

https://i.capitalone.com/G0k5OaWkQ

This is the best travel card IMO. The annual fee is low (comparatively), the travel credit is easy to use, the multipliers are convenient, and I’ve been able to make ample use of the Capital One lounge network as well as Priority Pass. The typical sign up bonus is 75k miles ($750). Signing up with this link gives me 10k miles (~$100).
